major.heading: Search strategy thin
major.comment: The search strategy omits two major databases and grey literature.

major.heading: Heterogeneity not pooled correctly
major.comment: Random-effects pooling is applied despite I2 above 95%.

major.heading: Clinical overclaim
major.comment: Clinical actionability is asserted beyond the evidence.

major.heading: Heterogeneity echo
major.comment: I2 heterogeneity is high and pooling is questionable.
